mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_check_project WHERE deleted = 0
AND (project_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, project_code, name, category, cost_price, retail_price, price, unit, invoice_item, body_part, allow_member_discount, status, creator, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_check_project WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_check_project (project_code, name, category, cost_price, retail_price, price, unit, invoice_item, body_part, allow_member_discount, status, creator, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{projectCode}, #{name}, #{category}, #{costPrice}, #{retailPrice}, #{price}, #{unit}, #{invoiceItem}, #{bodyPart}, #{allowMemberDiscount}, #{status}, #{creator}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_check_project
project_code = #{projectCode}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, cost_price = #{costPrice}, retail_price = #{retailPrice}, price = #{price}, unit = #{unit}, invoice_item = #{invoiceItem}, body_part = #{bodyPart}, allow_member_discount = #{allowMemberDiscount}, status = #{status}, creator = #{creator}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
